name: unimap-condor

scripts.test:recommendations: rm -rf .tmp-recommendation-tests && tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --outDir .tmp-recommendation-tests --rootDir . --noEmit false tests/recommendationPolicy.test.ts src/recommendationPolicy.ts src/types.ts && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-recommendation-tests/tests/recommendationPolicy.test.js

description: Interactive university intelligence map built with React, MapLibre, OpenFreeMap, OpenAlex, and ROR.
